bead.title: fizeau: CONTRACT-003 extension for ExcludeProvider + ProviderID/Class/ActualPower + review cost
bead.description: Upstream extension to Fizeau (CONTRACT-003): ExecuteRequest gets ExcludeProvider field; ExecuteResponse gets ProviderID, ProviderClass, ActualPower; reviewer cost reported separately. **Blocks** S10_3, S10_5, S10_6. Endpoint-first redesign coupling — must ship in tight parallel with the upstream work.
bead.acceptance: 1. CONTRACT-003 update merged upstream. 2. ddx imports the new agent module via tagged release (NEVER go.mod replace). 3. Schema changes documented.
